Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1237 "COMBAT-LEADER-2000-1237" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $2000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Combat Leader.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $2000 which sets $02 to $1B to allow the game to run correctly (this normally gets set during the original load routine and seems to a simple copy protection).
Also made the following changes to allow any key or the joystick button in port two to skip the intro: 1. Patched the JSR $FFE4 instruction at $29F2 to be JSR $2100 instead 2. Added a small routine at $2100 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets the accumulator to $01 and returns, which skips the intro. If not pressed, the routine then JSRs to $FFE4 (GETIN) to check if a key is pressed and carry on the normal code flow. 3. Patched the CPY #$87 BNE $29FC instructions to at $29F5 be CMP #$00 BEQ $29FC instead so that any key can be pressed to skip the intro, not just F5 as per the original.
Note: the disk version was used as it includes the intro picture and music, unlike the tape version.
